## Goal

Design and ship the ability for the patron to "enter" a completed (or in-progress) autonomous session as an interactive multi-turn conversation — resuming the anima's full context window so the patron can ask questions, give corrections, or extend the work without starting from scratch. The outcome is a working `nsg consult --session <id>` (or equivalent) command backed by the Parlour apparatus.
